requirements: R1: leads_to(tree, 'collect personal data', 'send email notification')
R2: executed_by(tree, 'collect personal data', 'credit bureau service')
R4: leads_to(tree, 'check bank privilege', 'check credit worthiness')
R5: precedence(tree, 'determine loan risk', 'check credit worthiness')
R6: executed_by_return(tree, 'check bank privilege') != executed_by_return(tree, 'check credit worthiness')
R7: (executed_by(tree, 'check bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check bank privilege', 'supervisor'))
R10: (leads_to(tree, 'check risks', 'approve request') or leads_to(tree, 'check risks', 'reject request'))
R14: min_time_between(tree, 'sign loan contract', 'close offer', '7 working days')
R17: condition_directly_follows(tree, '(loanRequestCredit > 1000000 and not exists(tree, "check credit worthiness"))', 'create suspense file')
